title: Expanding the Digital Horizon
content: The journey has just begun. I've implemented a dark mode and a more refined CSS architecture to ensure this space is as functional as it is aesthetic. This is my first real step into building a home for my thoughts.
author: Eustaquio

title: The Genesis of Eustaquio World
content: This is the first post on my new digital home. Built with pure HTML, CSS, and JS. A clean slate for future thoughts.
author: Eustaquio
